news.summary: A report on the South Korea construction industry predicts a 3.5% annual growth rate, reaching KRW 119.24 trillion in 2025. The data has been incorporated into ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings.
news.headline: South Korea construction market to reach KRW 119.24 trillion in 2025, growth of 3.5% annually. Robust growth trend expected to continue.

news.summary: Philadelphia-based technology company, Inoxoft, is providing a Software Technical Audit to safeguard eCommerce websites from downtime and enhance their performance, potentially preventing losses of $675 million on Black Friday.
news.headline: Black Friday downtime may cost retailers $675 million, Inoxoft provides audit to prevent losses.

news.summary: Intentsify, a prominent B2B intent data and AI-driven marketing programs provider based in Westwood, Massachusetts, has revealed the appointment of Chris Modzelewski as the Executive Vice President of Ad Solutions and Data Monetization. This significant leadership move signifies Intentsify's strategic effort to enhance their presence in the audience and ad solutions sector. The company is experiencing notable growth, and this addition is expected to further distinguish their offerings in the market.
news.headline: Intentsify names Chris Modzelewski EVP of Ad Solutions and Data Monetization, expanding in growing market.

news.summary: A global partnership has been announced between Shippeo and Elemica aimed at enhancing supply chain orchestration. The partnership is set to have a significant impact on the IT sector, with details revealing that the collaboration will focus on leveraging Shippeo's expertise in real-time transportation visibility and Elemica's prowess in supply chain digital transformation. This joint effort is geared towards providing comprehensive solutions to enhance supply chain efficiency on a global scale.
news.headline: Shippeo and Elemica Partner to Improve Supply Chain Orchestration globally. Paris-based Shippeo to collaborate with IT company Elemica.

news.summary: AM Best, headquartered in Oldwick, New Jersey, will have a significant presence at the upcoming InsurTech Hartford Symposium on April 29-30, 2025, at the Connecticut Convention Center in Hartford. Sridhar Manyem, the senior director of Industry Research and Analytics at AM Best, will lead a panel session titled “Regulatory Challenges and Compliance: Adapting to New Rules While Fostering Innovation.” The event aims to address current and future regulatory issues within the insurance industry.
news.headline: AM Best to host discussions at InsurTech Symposium on April 29-30, 2025 in Hartford, CT. Panel on "Regulatory Challenges and Compliance" moderated by Sridhar Manyem.

news.summary: A technology and research firm, ISG, has recognized Chetu, a global provider of digital intelligence and software solutions, for its advanced analytics and Artificial Intelligence (AI) services. Chetu was highlighted in ISG's Provider Lens™ Advanced Analytics and AI Services report as being in the “Sweet Spot” section. Key capabilities of Chetu mentioned in the report include comprehensive AI and analytics expertise, data integration and modernization, and next-gen AI capabilities. This acknowledgment underscores Chetu's prowess in the tech industry and signifies its strong position in the market.
news.headline: ISG acknowledges Chetu for AI & analytics excellence, highlighting key capabilities in report. via Business Wire.

news.summary: Today, the prestigious 2022 Governor's State of Sport Award for "Event of the Year" was claimed at the Jon M. Huntsman Center at the University of Utah. The event, held in VISTA, Calif., on April 15, 2025, was a remarkable collaboration between the Utah Sports Commission and Tony Hawk Inc. showcasing an extraordinary weekend dedicated to skateboarding.
news.headline: Utah Sports Commission and Tony Hawk Inc. host 5th Annual Tony Hawk's Vert Alert, winner of 2022 Governor's State of Sport Award at the University of Utah's Huntsman Center. Weekend event in April 2025.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, in Hong Kong, Ruko, a well-known brand specializing in family-friendly drones, introduced the U11MINI 4K. This compact drone is aimed at beginners, travelers, and photography lovers. The U11MINI 4K boasts ultra-clear 8K imaging and a remarkable 20,000ft long-range capability.
news.headline: Ruko launched U11MINI 4K drone - compact, beginner-friendly with 8K imaging, 20,000ft long-range.

news.summary: The recent collapse of the Mantra (OM) token has led to comparisons with the Terra ecosystem crash in May 2022, with some calling Mantra the "next Terra." However, experts like Ben Yorke from DeFi project Woo and Alexis Sirkia from Yellow Network argue that the two incidents are fundamentally different. Mantra's OM token plummeted 92% on April 13, dropping from over $6 to approximately $0.52 within hours, resulting in a $5.4 billion market capitalization loss. In contrast, TerraClassicUSD (formerly UST) took five days to lose a similar percentage, shedding $17.2 billion. The LUNA crash exhibited a more gradual decline. Yorke and Sirkia mentioned that Terra's collapse was due to systemic issues with its algorithmic stablecoin, while Mantra's crash was attributed to mismanagement and insider-held tokens being moved to exchanges. The experts emphasized that Mantra's failure was not due to a protocol flaw but to a breakdown in token handling. The Mantra CEO plans to release a report on the events leading to the crash.
news.headline: Mantra's OM token crashed by 92%, losing $5.4 billion in just hours, sparking comparisons to Terra Luna's $17.2 billion crash.

news.summary: A prominent investment firm has acquired NSM's U.S. commercial insurance division to drive growth and innovation within the MGA platform. As part of the transition, NSM will transform into two distinct entities, introducing two new independent brands. The acquisition was finalized on April 15, 2025, in Conshohocken, Pennsylvania. This move is set to invigorate the MGA platform and is a strategic step towards expansion and development within the commercial insurance sector.
news.headline: NSM Insurance Group sells U.S. commercial insurance division to New Mountain Capital, creating two separate entities.

news.summary: A special 12-year Kentucky Straight Bourbon will be released in limited quantity to commemorate the grand opening in LEXINGTON, Ky on May 14, 2025. RD1 Spirits, recognized for its innovative Kentucky Straight Bourbon and distinctive wood finishes, unveiled this news on April 15, 2025.
news.headline: RD1 Spirits opening new distillery in Lexington on May 14, 2025. Limited release of 12-year Kentucky Straight Bourbon.

news.summary: In its recent global survey, GMAC reported a growing emphasis on Return on Investment (ROI) among business school candidates, with diminishing appeal of the tech sector. Released on April 15, 2025 in Reston, Virginia by PRNewswire, the survey reveals a strong desire among prospective students to acquire strategic thinking skills. The survey encompasses a large number of participants and signifies a shifting trend in candidate preferences for business education.
news.headline: GMAC survey shows aspiring business students prioritize strategic thinking, seek help from AI. Increasing focus on ROI as tech sector appeal diminishes.@dynamic dates.

news.summary: One Communications has recently integrated ClearSky's Total Traffic Manager into their system, resulting in increased data traffic flows and enhanced customer satisfaction. The implementation took place in ORLANDO, Fla., on April 15, 2025. ClearSky's Total Traffic Management (TTM) service allows mobile network operators to effectively monitor and control their network traffic. This development is crucial in improving overall customer experience and ensuring seamless data flow.
news.headline: One Communications implements ClearSky's Total Traffic Manager to enhance data flow and customer satisfaction. News from April 15, 2025.

news.summary: A new response solution has been introduced by MarketsandMarkets, based in DELRAY BEACH, Fla., on April 15, 2025. news.summary: The latest statistics show a significant increase in housing prices across various regions. In the last year, the average home price has surged by an average of 12.5%, with some areas experiencing even higher spikes of up to 20%. The demand for housing has also seen a notable rise, with a 15% increase in the number of homes sold compared to the previous year. Analysts attribute this trend to factors such as low interest rates, a booming economy, and a shortage of available properties. Experts predict that this upward trajectory in the housing market is likely to continue in the coming months.
news.headline: Altria will live stream its first-quarter results for 2025.

news.summary: Miami-based company Captiva Containers, LLC has received a minority growth investment from private investment firm Trivest Partners. news.headline: Captiva Containers receives minority growth investment from Trivest Partners, a Miami-based firm, through TGIF fund.

news.summary: In a statement released today, Inex One, a prominent market research platform, unveiled the findings of their latest report titled "The Expert Network Market Sizing 2025". The report highlights that the worldwide expert network sector exceeded $2.5 billion in revenue in 2024, experiencing a noteworthy 9% increase following a period of sluggish growth. This data signifies a positive turnaround for the industry after facing a slowdown in previous years.
news.headline: Inex One reports expert network industry surpassing $2.5 billion in 2024, growing 9% after slower years.

news.summary: The market for Lithium Titanate (LTO) batteries is experiencing significant growth due to their exceptional safety features, rapid charging capabilities, and extended lifespan in comparison to conventional lithium-ion batteries. LTO batteries boast the ability to charge in just a few minutes, rendering them particularly suitable for applications such as electric buses, hybrid vehicles, and grid storage systems. These batteries are gaining traction in various sectors due to their impressive performance metrics, indicating a rising trend towards adoption of LTO technology.
news.headline: Global Lithium Titanate (LTO) Batteries Market to grow to $218.5 million by 2033 at 13.1% CAGR, driven by safety and fast charging.
